title: Inverted Texture
description: This set of resources inverts textures.
body:
# About the resource pack:
This resource pack inverts textures, making them strange for many.

It may be suitable for those who like to create challenges, or fans of very strange things.

(so far only block and item textures are inverted)

# Note:

Please do not install this resource pack together with other similar ones to avoid conflicts.
